headline: ON Semiconductor (ON) Is Buying Synaptics In A $7 Billion All Stock Deal
summary: ON Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:ON) has agreed to acquire Synaptics in an all stock deal valued at $7b. The transaction is aimed at expanding ON Semiconductor's reach into AI driven intelligent systems and edge AI applications. The deal is intended to add advanced AI processors and wireless connectivity alongside ON Semiconductor's existing power and analog portfolio. ON Semiconductor enters this deal with its share price at $90.65 and a mixed recent track record, including a decline of 25.5%...

headline: On Semiconductor (ON) Stock After 25% Weekly Drop Is The Valuation Now Attractive
summary: If you are trying to work out whether ON Semiconductor is attractively priced or not, the recent share moves and current valuation metrics give you plenty to think about. The stock closed at US$90.65, with the share price down 25.5% over the last week and down 27.4% over the last month, although it is still up 59.9% year to date and up 71.3% over the past year. Recent headlines have focused on how ON Semiconductor fits into themes such as electric vehicles, power management and chip supply...

headline: onsemi: Chasing AI Opportunities With Synaptics
summary: onsemi announced a $7 billion all-stock acquisition of Synaptics, triggering a sharp share price decline, expanding Edge AI too. Read why ON stock is a hold.

headline: What Analog Devices Stock Was Saying By Intentionally Selling Less
summary: Before the chipmaker's stock surged, management was telling anyone who would listen that they were deliberately holding back sales in their biggest market.
